name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝗝𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗺𝗼𝗻𝗲𝘆 𝗶𝘀 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿𝘀." |

where an affliction of baby fever leads Gojo to your door... begging you to bear a kid for him.

no comment today other than a gojo x maid is coming. absolutely dying for it 😫 just not sure whether to do it in a modern setting or another era? please please please let me know which you'd prefer so i prepare for posting (hopefully tomorrow).

enjoy ! 🫶🏼
